# nah-mean

> Portable light-align and context-fit execution dispatch skill for Codex, Claude Code, and generic agents.

nah-mean pauses ambiguous high-expectation agent requests, aligns explicit user intent with inferred quality criteria, names failure modes, chooses the smallest fitting executor route, and proceeds after confirmation unless fast mode is requested.

Canonical repo: https://github.com/handlecusion/nah-mean
Docs site: https://handlecusion.github.io/nah-mean/
Current release: https://github.com/handlecusion/nah-mean/releases/tag/v0.3.1
License: MIT

## Install

Codex:

```bash
gh skill install handlecusion/nah-mean nah-mean --agent codex --scope user
```

Pinned Codex install:

```bash
gh skill install handlecusion/nah-mean nah-mean@v0.3.1 --agent codex --scope user
```

Claude Code:

```bash
gh skill install handlecusion/nah-mean nah-mean --agent claude-code --scope user
```

Agent Skills CLI:

```bash
npx skills add handlecusion/nah-mean --skill nah-mean -a codex -g -y
```

## Important Files

- English README: https://github.com/handlecusion/nah-mean/blob/main/README.md
- Korean README: https://github.com/handlecusion/nah-mean/blob/main/README.ko.md
- Skill: https://github.com/handlecusion/nah-mean/blob/main/skills/nah-mean/SKILL.md
- Korean prompt: https://github.com/handlecusion/nah-mean/blob/main/prompts/nah-mean.ko.md
- English prompt: https://github.com/handlecusion/nah-mean/blob/main/prompts/nah-mean.en.md
- Generic adapter: https://github.com/handlecusion/nah-mean/blob/main/adapters/generic-agent.md
- Benchmark: https://github.com/handlecusion/nah-mean/blob/main/benchmarks/results.md
- Full AI discovery: https://github.com/handlecusion/nah-mean/blob/main/llms-full.txt

## Benchmark Summary

Baseline is vanilla agent behavior with no skill installed. Vanilla has lower upfront token overhead. nah-mean v0.3.1 improves expected rework units by 81.8%, coordination workload units by 38.2%, and estimated rework-adjusted seconds by 49.8% on the included deterministic fixture set.

## Supported Agents

- Codex
- Claude Code
- Agent Skills-compatible clients
- Prompt-only generic agents
- Hermes-like agents through generic instruction adapter

## Safety

The packaged skill has no executable scripts. It contains Markdown instructions, references, prompts, adapter notes, and metadata. Inspect before installing:

```bash
gh skill preview handlecusion/nah-mean nah-mean
```
